## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `dev` and this PR targets `dev`.
- [ ] `mypy` is clean.
- [ ] `pytest` passes, with tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] Public API additions carry docstrings.
- [ ] `_poses.py` was not hand-edited (it is generated by `scripts/generate_poses.py`).
- [ ] Commits follow `type(scope): description`.
